response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrable experience with Java/Kotlin, JVM tooling, Spring ecosystem, or enterprise IDE development — key requirements for the role. Their work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile apps, with only peripheral Java exposure in early roles without evidence of deep JVM or IDE internals expertise.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and platforms
Active open-source contributor with tooling and infrastructure projects
Proven ability to lead and teach through workshops and documentation
concerns: No evidence of recent or deep Java/Kotlin or JVM internals work
Lacks experience with Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or enterprise build tools
IDE and language tooling experience is absent or tangential to the role
